title: Simple Zombie Pie Modpack
description: Introduces a Zombie Apocalypse system, Gun system and Better terrain to experience a realistic world full of zombies.

## <center>What's this?
</center>


_Simple Zombie Pie_ is a Minecraft Modpack that introduces a realistic Zombie Apocalypse System, Adds Fully Animated 3D Guns, and Enhanced terrain. This modpack mainly focuses on Fabric 1.18.2 & 1.19.2.

<center>

---
  
</center>


## <center>Features
</center>


Features of the modpack:
- Supports Fabric 1.18.2 & 1.19.2. (might expand to 1.16-1.17)
- 4 New types of Zombies with its own mechanics.
- OVER 50 New Fully Animated 3D guns (includes firing, reloading and aiming animations).
- Adds 4 Granades with Custom models and Sounds.
- Adds OVER 95 NEW biomes and almost Enhances every vanilla biomes with new and better features.
- Adds new obtainable blocks and items.
- New detailed structures that you can find all around your world.
- Enhanced world generation which focuses on transforming how terrain is shaped.
- OVER 50 performance mods designed to boost performance.
- And more features to discover!

<center>

---
  
</center>

## <center>NOTES:
</center>

Install the NEWEST version of this modpack.

All dependencies needed are already installed in this modpack so you don't need to install them manually.

And no, world seeds are not fixed. Every world seed is different.

<center>

---
  
</center>

## <center>BUG REPORTING & FEATURES REQUEST:
</center>

If you find any bugs or have a suggestion for improvements, request a issue throught this [link.](https://github.com/SnipeCope/Simple-Zombie-Pie-Issues/issues) You can also DM me in Discord (@snipecope)
